title: The Avalanche Begins
description: On pages 1–10, the avalanche begins as luffy, Sanji, and Nami are caught in Drum Island’s mountain danger as the snow itself becomes an enemy.
scene: The Avalanche Begins. Luffy, Sanji, and Nami are caught in Drum Island’s mountain danger as the snow itself becomes an enemy. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Usopp! This sound... could it be...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It sounds like a big one!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This village is gonna be hit...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Those freakin' rabbits! Damn them all to hell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How the hell should I know!? Just be sure to keep an eye on 5 things: Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami, Nami,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Keep her safe no matter what!

summary: This part centers on the avalanche begins, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
